description: Context imagery first, then the quotation lands as a designed card — the Ulysses-video habit of letting the source speak after you've seen its world.
when_to_use: A quotation the narration sets up and then delivers. Scene 1 shows the world (own asset, slow push); scene 2 is the card. Never open cold on the card.

roles.note: the scene's own asset; camera grammar provides the push
